'''Mirialan''' was the native language of the [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialan]] species from [[Mirial/Legends|Mirial]]. Most Mirialans also learned to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] during childhood.

{{Language-stub}}
